packs.title: Group performance
packs.description: Keeps a selected ensemble or formation visible through crossings and temporary occlusion.
packs.sourceTitle: People Dancing - Free Stock Creative Commons Video

packs.title: Object and product focus
packs.description: Follows a product or manipulated object while preserving the hands-and-object interaction envelope.
packs.sourceTitle: Pouring Coffee On Cup - Free Stock Creative Commons Video

packs.title: Animal companion
packs.description: Tracks dogs and cats with wider fallback framing when keypoints or identity confidence fall.
packs.sourceTitle: Dogs Running On A Snowy Day - Free Stock Creative Commons Video

packs.title: Climbing
packs.description: Frames the climber and movement corridor with conservative holds when the subject becomes tiny or occluded.
packs.sourceTitle: Rock Climbing - Free Stock Creative Commons Video

packs.title: Workout
packs.description: Keeps one or more athletes and relevant equipment visible across exercise repetitions.
packs.sourceTitle: Two People Working Out 4K Free Copyrights Creative Common Licences

packs.title: Skateboarding
packs.description: Tracks the rider-board envelope and adds predictive lead room around takeoff and landing.
packs.sourceTitle: Person Skateboarding Indoors - Free Stock Creative Commons Video

packs.title: Basketball
packs.description: Follows the ball, hoop, and nearest action envelope rather than centering one player blindly.
packs.sourceTitle: Basketball - Free Stock Creative Commons Video

packs.title: Soccer
packs.description: Uses the ball and active-player envelope to preserve buildup, strike, and goal context.
packs.sourceTitle: Soccer Players Training - Free Stock Creative Commons Video
